title: Antigravity vs Claude
author: A Cosmic Showdown — Physics vs Intelligence

slides.title: Antigravity vs Claude
slides.subtitle: When Physics Meets Intelligence — Who Defies Reality First?
slides.body: One bends spacetime. The other bends language. Antigravity has eluded physicists for centuries; Claude emerged in just five years. Both promise to shatter every limit we thought was permanent — and neither plays by the rules.

slides.title: ⚡ Round 1: The Challengers ⚡
slides.subtitle: Two forces that bend the laws of the universe
slides.body: Before we crown a winner, meet the contenders: a dream of physics that rewrites Newton, and an intelligence that rewrites thought itself. Centuries apart in origin — yet both arrived at the same impossible promise.

slides.title: The Physics of Antigravity
bullets: ⚛️ Negative mass: hypothetical matter that actively repels gravity
🌀 Alcubierre drive: contract space ahead, expand it behind
🌌 Dark energy: the universe's own antigravity at cosmic scale
💎 Casimir effect: quantum vacuum exerts a measurable repulsive force
🔭 Breakthrough: metamaterials may manipulate gravitational coupling

slides.title: Claude's Neural Architecture
bullets: 🧠 Transformer: scaled attention across 200K-token context windows
⚖️ Constitutional AI: self-critiques outputs for safety and alignment
🌊 RLHF: shaped by millions of hours of human preference feedback
🔗 Tool use: calls APIs, runs code, reads files, browses the web
🎯 Multi-modal: reasons over text, images, charts and documents

slides.quote: The universe has two master cheats: gravity bends space so mass moves without force; Claude bends language so meaning moves without effort. Neither plays fair — and that is exactly what makes both worth studying.

slides.title: Future Applications
right: 🔬 AI designs proteins that cure diseases

slides.title: Where They Converge
bullets: 🤝 Both challenge what humanity believes is physically possible
🌌 Antigravity needs AI to model quantum spacetime geometry
🧠 Claude needs physics to ground reasoning in hard reality
⚡ Together: AI-designed metamaterials that repel gravity
🚀 Endgame — intelligence and physics unify in one singularity

slides.title: 🏆 The Verdict
slides.subtitle: Antigravity defies the universe. Claude defies the mind.
slides.body: The real winner? Whoever harnesses both. The future belongs not to physics alone, nor to AI alone — but to the civilisation bold enough to aim a superintelligence at the last unsolved law of nature.
